violations.text: The (kitchen) is lacking a hand-washing sink.PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the servers station. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

Working containers of (dry ingredients) are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

The presence of (rodents ) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings in kitchen and basement ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026
(Various food product ) were observed stored on the floor in the (kitchen and basement ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026
(Prep unit door ) located in the (kitchen ) area was not in good repair. Observed door detached from hinges when opened. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the (food and equipment storage shelves in kitchen basement) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, rodent droppings and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026
The (door ) in the (kitchen) area is in poor repair. Observed a hole. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

The presence of (rodents) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings in basement area). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the (food storage shelves in basement area ) have an accumulation of food residue, soil residue, and/or rodent droppings. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2024
The walls in the near stairs in basement area is in poor repair. Holes observed covered with tape. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024

The coving in kitchen area is in poor repair. Missing pieces of coving. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2024

(Chicken and Tofu) was observed held at (46-47 ) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024

The presence of (rodents ) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2024
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the (basement) area. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024

walk in cooler located in the (basement) area was not in good repair. Ambient temperatures observed at 46DF.Establishment not allowed to store any TCS food in unit until repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces observed with debris: 1.food storage shelves in the kitchen and basement area have soil residue and rodent droppings. 2.food storage bins in basement observed with soil residue and food debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (outside refuse ) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2024
The walls near basement stairs area is in poor repair. Observed holes. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024
The coving in kitchen area is in poor repair. Missing pieces of coving. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024
